text:
PDTRY_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: PDTRY_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
211D00000X: Assistant, Podiatric 
213E00000X: Podiatrist 
213EG0000X: Podiatrist — general practice 
213EP0504X: Podiatrist — public medicine 
213EP1101X: Podiatrist — primary podiatric medicine 
213ER0200X: Podiatrist —
